definitions: The space (usually measured in degrees) between two intersecting lines or surfaces at or close to the point where they meet.
A particular way of approaching or considering an issue or problem.
A projecting corner, edge, or part of something.
examples: The angle of the roof was steep.
Let's look at the problem from a different angle.
He always had an interesting angle on things.
Be careful not to hit the angle of the table.
